context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the upgrade-engine instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Core principle:** Every claimed Rails/Ruby version must be in the CI matrix. Prefer explicit support targets over accidental compatibility.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: CI matrix must pass — not just main Rails version

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run `bundle exec rake zeitwerk:check` — file paths must match constant names exactly.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Check initializer behavior across boot and reload — use `config.to_prepare` for reload-sensitive hooks.

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Verify gemspec dependency bounds match tested versions: `spec.add_dependency "rails", ">= 7.0", "< 8.0"` — bounds must match what CI actually tests.

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Check optional integrations (jobs, mailers, assets, routes) per version.

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: CI matrix must run against each claimed Rails/Ruby combination:
